goal: Phase 1 trigger-first revision-first local state model for Orun
notes: Task 0009 (M3 PR-A verifier) verified PASS on 2026-05-30, PR #157 squash-merged → main commit 7f1e53d at 03:33:16Z. Branch impl/task-0007-m3-revision-pra deleted. Verifier report ai/reports/task-0009-verifier.md. Coverage internal/revision 93.3 % (gate ≥90 %), internal/statestore 96.1 % (no regression). Both required CI runs SUCCESS at log level on the verifier-side commit (post-report push: Orun Plan run on PR head 16ae465, Harness dry-run guard same). Claim-first ordering deviation from cli-surface.md §1.2 step-7 ACCEPTED in-place (no proposal filed) — rationale: CreateIfAbsent is the only exclusive primitive in state-store.md §3, claim-first is the only ordering producing distinct revision keys before any body write occurs under concurrent (TriggerKey, planHash) duplicates, refs still land after bodies preserving §6 crash-recovery, and cli-surface.md §1.2 reads as a high-level descriptive flow not a normative atomicity proof. Risk Notes carry forward: stateStoreVersionPath() lives in internal/revision (deferred relocation), writeCompatibilityMirror is a no-op stub gated by default-true Config.CompatibilityWrites (M5 fills the body), RevSummary.JobCount = 0 in PR-A (PR-B threads it via WriteManifest).

M3 PR-A scope is now CLOSED on main: internal/revision/{model,keys,writer,version}.go + 3 _test files + Makefile coverage gate. Direct internal imports stay leaf-clean (statestore + triggerctx only). PlanRevision struct + version.json envelope byte-match data-model.md §3 / §1. Revision-key regex + collision-suffix logic + 100-iteration uniqueness/collision property test all present and green. All exported symbols carry doc comments. No new error sentinels; no string concatenation for paths.

Next task = **Task 0010 = M3 PR-B implementer** — `internal/revision/manifest.go` (`WriteManifest`, `UpdateLatestExecutionSummary`), `internal/revision/resolver.go` (`ResolveRevision` seven-branch resolver per compatibility-and-migration.md §3), and the legacy `.orun/plans/<checksum>.json` mirror body promoting `writeCompatibilityMirror` from `// TODO(m5)` stub to a real conditional write gated by `Config.CompatibilityWrites`. Coverage gate stays ≥90 % on internal/revision; resolver test matrix MUST cover all 7 resolution branches; compat-writes flag MUST exercise both true and false body paths.

Task 0005 (M2 PR-C) verified PASS on 2026-05-30, PR #156 squash-merged → main commit cd8b3e8. Coverage on internal/statestore measured 96.1 % (gate ≥95 %, M2 stretch ≥96 % met). Verifier report ai/reports/task-0006-verifier.md. Milestone M2 fully closed.
